name: threemf-dense6-import
description: Bug-0047 guard — the 6-sphere min-union 3MF (~130 expanded scalar graph nodes) must STRUCTURALLY compile (levelsetsVoxelBaked=0) and render real geometry. Before the liveness register-reuse fix this exact fixture died on 'register exhaustion (>64 live values)' and silently degraded to a bounding-sphere placeholder. Also asserts Stage-1 dense routing (activeRep=atlasBaked).

commands: window.__canaryLoadThreeMFFromUrl('/test-dense-blob6.3mf').then(function(r){ if (!r || !r.atoms) throw new Error('dense6 3MF load returned no atoms: ' + JSON.stringify(r)); if (r.diagnostics && r.diagnostics.levelsetsVoxelBaked > 0) throw new Error('bug 0047 REGRESSED: 6-sphere graph voxel-baked to placeholder instead of structural compile; diagnostics=' + JSON.stringify(r.diagnostics)); return 'structural compile OK: ' + JSON.stringify(r.diagnostics); })

(() => { const s = window.__canaryGetEvalSnapshot(); const reps = (s && s.atomDispatch && s.atomDispatch.byActiveRep) || {}; if (!reps.atlasBaked) { throw new Error('dense6 import did NOT route to atlasBaked; byActiveRep=' + JSON.stringify(reps)); } return 'dense6 routed to atlas: ' + JSON.stringify(reps); })()
